full_description: Travel Planner is a travel app that helps users plan and organize their trips. It features a map view, itinerary builder, and destination guides. With Travel Planner, you can easily create and manage your trip itinerary, add destinations, and book flights and hotels. The map view allows you to visualize your trip and get directions between locations. The destination guides provide you with essential information about your destinations, including places to visit, things to do, and local customs. Whether you're planning a business trip or a vacation, Travel Planner is the perfect tool to help you make the most of your journey.
